title: The Crocodile Who Forgot to Be Scary
cover_description: A deflated crocodile sitting on the ground looking up sadly while a girl casually wipes her shoe on the grass.
script:
[TITLE: The Crocodile Who Forgot to Be Scary]
[AGE: 9-12]
[VOICES: young_sweet, comedic_villain]
[COMEDY_TYPE: villain_fails]

[SETUP]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: deadpan, unbothered] You’re standing on my shadow again. [STING: sweet_pause]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: confident, bluster] I am not standing on your shadow. I am looming ominously over it. [STING: villain_dramatic]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: deadpan] That’s the same thing.

[BEAT_1]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: triumphant] Behold, mortal! My terrifying presence alone should make you tremble! [STING: villain_entrance]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: deadpan] You’re drooling. [STING: sweet_eyeroll]

[BEAT_2]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: defensive, loud] That is not drool! That is... villainous saliva! A sign of my dark power! [STING: villain_dramatic]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: deadpan] It’s on my shoe.

[BEAT_3]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: desperate, scrambling] Then it’s... cursed saliva! One touch and you’ll— [STING: buildup_long]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: quiet, devastating] It’s just spit. [STING: deflation]

[BUTTON]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: deflated, wistful] [PUNCHLINE]I used to be scary.[/PUNCHLINE] [STING: silence]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: unbothered] You used to be a lot of things. [STING: sweet_pause]

[COVER: A deflated crocodile sitting on the ground looking up sadly while a girl casually wipes her shoe on the grass.]
[PREMISE: crocodile fails to be intimidating]
